idea-plugin.name: AI Code Review
idea-plugin.description:
AI-powered code review and refactoring tool for IntelliJ IDEA.

Key Features:
• AI Analysis - Intelligent code review using OpenAI-compatible APIs
• Bug Detection - Identifies potential null pointer exceptions, resource leaks, concurrency issues
• Performance Optimization - Finds performance bottlenecks and inefficient patterns
• Security Scanning - Detects common security vulnerabilities
• Code Style - Enforces Java best practices and coding standards
• Smart Suggestions - Provides actionable code improvements with professional dialogs

Flexible Configuration:
• Configurable AI endpoints (OpenAI, proxies, self-hosted models)
• Secure API key management
• Professional suggestion dialogs with proper sizing and centering
• Copy-to-clipboard functionality
• Multi-language support (English/Chinese)
• Keyboard shortcuts and context menu integration

Perfect for:
• Java developers seeking AI-powered code reviews
• Teams wanting consistent code quality standards
• Developers using custom AI models or proxy services
• Anyone looking to improve code quality with intelligent suggestions

action.description: Send selected code to AI for review
